title: Waxed Not Waxed
description: Adds a simple indicator to know if a copper block is waxed or not!
body: # Waxed Not Waxed Adds a simple indicator to know if a copper block is waxed or not! ## Preview ## Toggling The indicator can be toggled with the `z` key ## Requirements [Fabric Language Kotlin >=1.7.1+kotlin.1.6.10](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
